data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Langkawi);  Perak  (Kampar, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Kelantan  (Gua Musang);  Terengganu ;  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Lipis, Raub and Jerantut);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor); and  Sabah:  Interior (Nabawan), West Coast (Ranau), Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid and Beluran) and Kudat until 1:00AM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Langkawi);  Perak  (Kampar, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Kelantan  (Gua Musang);  Terengganu ;  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Lipis, Raub dan Jerantut);  Selangor  (Hulu Selangor); dan  Sabah:  Pedalaman (Nabawan), Pantai Barat (Ranau), Sandakan (Tongod, Telupid dan Beluran) dan Kudat sehingga 1:00 pagi; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Category:  Tropical Depression Advisory (NN)                  Time of Observation:  17:00, 01 July 2026                  Location:  Latitude 14.5 North and Longitude 116.2 East                  Movement:  West 30 km/h.                  Maximum wind speed:  56 km/h                  Distance from nearest international city:  approximately 423 km Southwest of Santa Cruz, Philippines                  Distance from nearest Malaysian city:  Approximately 848 km Northwest of Kudat.                  Threat to Malaysia:  No significant impact.
data.text_bm: Kategori:  Nasihat Lekukan Tropika (NN)                  Masa Pencerapan:  17:00, 01 Julai 2026                  Kedudukan:  Latitud 14.5 Utara dan Longitud 116.2 Timur                  Pergerakan:  Ke arah Barat dengan kelajuan 30 km/j.                  Kelajuan angin maksimum:  56 km/j                  Jarak dari bandar antarabangsa terdekat:  kira-kira 423 km ke Barat Daya Santa Cruz, Filipina.                  Jarak dari bandar terdekat:  Kira-kira 848 km ke Barat Laut Laut Kudat.                  Kesan terhadap Malaysia:  Tiada kesan signifikan.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Selangor, East Johor, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan and Eastern Sabah within the period of 9:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026 until 1:00AM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Selangor, Johor Timur, Pahang, Terengganu, Kelantan dan Sabah Timur dalam tempoh 9:00 malam; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026 sehingga 1:00 pagi; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of eastern part of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, northern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu within the period of 9:00PM; Wednesday, 1 July 2026 until 1:00AM; Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan timur Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, Tioman, Condore, Bunguran, Reef North, utara Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu dalam tempoh 9:00 malam; Rabu, 1 Julai 2026 sehingga 1:00 pagi; Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.
